name: HTS_SCHED_SHIFT_EVENTS
description: Table to store schedule shift events

columns.Name: SCHED_SHIFT_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key column containing a random generated number.  This column is not updateable.

columns.Name: SCHED_REQUEST_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Identifier of the request as specified by the exporter

columns.Name: SCHED_EVENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Identifier of the schedule event as specified by the exporter

columns.Name: SCHED_SHIFT_EVENT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Identifier of the schedule shift event as specified by the exporter

columns.Name: SCHED_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: SCHED_EVENT_ID

columns.Name: SHIFT_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Shift identifier provided by the exporter

columns.Name: SHIFT_ACTION
columns.Comments:
Action to perform on the shift. Values are CREATE, UPDATE, or DELETE.
When the import mode is FULL, only CREATE actions are accepted

columns.Name: REF_DAY
columns.Comments: Date for the day of reference for the shift

columns.Name: START_TIME_STR
columns.Comments: The start time of shifts of type Time, entered in a format with time zone offset.

columns.Name: START_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: START_TIME_OFFSET

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: START_TIME

columns.Name: END_TIME_STR
columns.Comments: The end time of shifts of type Time, entered in a format with time zone offset.

columns.Name: END_TIME_OFFSET
columns.Comments: END_TIME_OFFSET

columns.Name: END_TIME
columns.Comments: END_TIME

columns.Name: DURATION
columns.Comments:
Duration of the shift in minutes.
Mandatory if the shift type is Elapsed. For other shift types, you must supply start and end times.

columns.Name: TIME_NOT_WORKED
columns.Comments:
Unpaid time at the shift level in minutes.
The shift value in the library provides the default value, which you can override.

columns.Name: SHIFT_CODE
columns.Comments: Reference to a shift in the library. Code is language-independent and is required only when you create or update shifts

columns.Name: SHIFT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of shift. Values are ELAPSED or TIME

columns.Name: SHIFT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Category of the shift. Values are (WORK or ABSENCE). In R13, the value WORK is the only accepted value.

columns.Name: STATUS_IMP
columns.Comments: Status for the import phase

columns.Name: STATUS_INT
columns.Comments: Status for the internalization phase

columns.Name: SHIFT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code of the shift type for the workforce schedule shift. Default REGULAR.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_SHIFT_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the enterprise shift. Nothing if custom shift, not from enterprise shift.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_SHIFT_DATE
columns.Comments: Calendar date of the workforce schedule shift; if shifts coming from enterprise shifts only.

columns.Name: UNPAID_BREAK_DURATION
columns.Comments: Unpaid break duration in minutes, if custom shift only.

columns.Name: PAID_BREAK_DURATION
columns.Comments: Paid break duration in minutes.

columns.Name: SHIFT_NOTES
columns.Comments: Notes added to the workforce schedule shift.

columns.Name: PREMIUM_SHIFT_CODE
columns.Comments: Premium code for the workforce schedule shift

columns.Name: ALLOW_OVERTIME_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicated if workers assigned to the workforce schedule shift can go over their assignment weekly hours

columns.Name: SHIFT_INCENTIVE
columns.Comments: Monetary amount a worker will get when assigned the workforce schedule shift.

columns.Name: ADV_SHIFT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Category for the workforce schedule shift, if custom shift only.

columns.Name: JOB_PROFILE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Job profile type used to define the skill: Job, Job family, Position, or Scheduling Group.

columns.Name: JOB_PROFILE_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the job profile type value used to describe the skill for the coverage.

columns.Name: JOB_SET_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that uniquely identifies the HCM job set used to identify which job type is represented on the workload value for the import record.

columns.Name: QUALIFICATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of criteria to including in the corresponding Qualification drop-down list.

columns.Name: QUALIFICATION
columns.Comments: Competency, license or certification, or language value for the selected qualification type.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the business unit.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: ALLOW_EDITS
columns.Comments:
Specify whether the shift that is imported can be edited by the scheduler in the application, on the Manage Planned Schedule page. Values are Y or N.
If the value is Y or null, shift edition is allowed only if the value of the option AllowEdits is Y on the schedule event or on the Worker Time Setup profile when it is not overriden on the schedule event.
